final_prompt.prompt:
Create an illustration of an underwater fantasy world (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a "梦幻童话风格" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Studio Ghibli's aquatic sequences, James Jean's ethereal dreamscape illustration, Art Nouveau organic flowing forms; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: framing is yours
Subject: must include a mermaid swimming among coral reefs, bioluminescent jellyfish, and a sunken ship treasure
Scene/backdrop: must be an underwater world with light rays penetrating from the ocean surface
Lighting/mood: needs a dreamy, ethereal atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a colorful, dreamlike direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
